description: Initializes the bus fetching routine ‘NXTBUS’ for retrieving buses in ascending alphabetical order. Dummy buses for multisection lines are included. Hidden star point buses of three winding transformers are excluded. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = ininam(string)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: Extended bus name, blank for first bus in ordered list. (input).

error_codes.description: Bus not found; ‘NXTBUS’ may not be used.
